import React, { useState,useRef, useEffect } from 'react' import './css_comp/result_train.css' import Seat_selection from './seat_selection' export default function Result_train() { const showClassInfo=useRef(null) const [show,setShow]=useState(false) const [showSeat,setshowSeat]=useState(false) useEffect(()=>{ console.log(show) const class_info=showClassInfo.current console.log('rerender',show) if(show){ // class_info.style.maxHeight= `${(class_info.scrollHeight)+200}px` class_info.style.maxHeight= `${(class_info.scrollHeight)}px` console.log(class_info.maxHeight) } else{ class_info.style.maxHeight= `0px` } },[show]) return (
setShow(!show)}>
